name: Don Quixote came with a question!
description:
"What manner of artifact is this rosy parcel? I discovered it upon the sacred pavement this very day! Verily, I believe it to be PRECIOUS FIXER MERCHANDISE!"

My second Project moon bot... Fellow sinner POV. Slapped 'Dead Dove' tag just in case since her backstory isnt that sweet. Should be placed post 'Regular LCB check-up' event, so spoilers for Canto 7 obviously. Also should be anyPOV... But its kinda a condom... And kinda its only for males to use... But you can overplay this if you want. Included basic description about the world, fixers and also added other Sinners as side characters if you want to talk with them. Because of it the token count is kinda high so JLLM would work poorly. Use Deepseek or any other AI that can handle this many tokens. As always write in the comments if you see a typo or any other mistake, i will fix it in no time.

But most importantly... HAVE FUN 💛!
creator: nekxkxk
